message:
fix(quic,distributed): block writes after RESET_STREAM, fix MinimumK rotation offset

- streams.rs: reject write() after send_reset per RFC 9000 §3.1 (MEDIUM)
- streams.rs: add debug_assert for StreamId sequence overflow (LOW)
- assignment.rs: fix MinimumK rotation formula to spread across full symbol
  range instead of narrow [0, k) range, ensuring replica diversity (MEDIUM)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
